def fetch_record(record_id, include_details=False):
    record = db.get(record_id)
    if record is None:
        return {"error": "not found"}
    if include_details:
        return {
            "id": record.id,
            "name": record.name,
            "details": record.details,
            "history": record.history,
            "permissions": record.permissions,
        }
    return {"id": record.id, "name": record.name}

def get_config(key, as_dict=False):
    raw = config_store.read(key)
    if as_dict:
        return {"key": key, "value": raw, "source": "env", "overrides": []}
    return raw

def load_user_profile(user_id, full=False):
    user = db.query(User).get(user_id)
    if full:
        return {"user": user, "settings": user.settings, "audit_log": user.audit_log}
    return user.name
